title: Steve Jobs’ Career Advice: Why his ‘connect the dots’ quote still guides work; small bets beat big plans
summary_full: Steve Jobs' famous advice, 'You can't connect the dots looking forward; you can only connect them looking backwards,' offers a practical guide for navigating career uncertainty.  Instead of demanding clarity, finding meaning emerges from experiences.  This approach encourages exploration and 'small bets' over meticulous planning, fostering creativity and adaptability in today's dynamic job market.
